# Edita Andrijasevic – Raine & Horne Real Estate Auckland

> Real estate advice, property appraisals, selling support and local property marketing across West Auckland.

## Important Pages

- [Home](https://peterandedita.co.nz/): Main website for Edita Andrijasevic and Raine & Horne real estate services.
- [Free Home Appraisal West Auckland](https://peterandedita.co.nz/free-home-appraisal-west-auckland/): Free property appraisal service for West Auckland homeowners.
- [Real Estate Agent West Auckland](https://peterandedita.co.nz/real-estate-agent-west-auckland/): Information about Edita’s local real estate services.
- [Services](https://peterandedita.co.nz/services/): Real estate services for homeowners preparing to sell.
- [Locations](https://peterandedita.co.nz/locations/): Local real estate advice across West Auckland suburbs.
- [Articles](https://peterandedita.co.nz/articles/): Seller guides and real estate articles.

## Contact

- [Website](https://peterandedita.co.nz/): Official website.
- [Raine & Horne Blockhouse Bay](https://www.raineandhorne.co.nz/blockhousebay): Official Raine & Horne office profile.
